home.hero_subtitle: CrowdPay runs on Stellar: fast settlement, optional cross-asset conversion, and a clear path from pledge to on-chain receipt.
home.browseHint: or browse below and tap a card to contribute.
home.noPublicCampaigns: No public campaigns yet. Sign up to get notified when you create or back the first project.
home.noMatches: No campaigns match your search or filters.
home.welcomeBody: Your account includes a custodial Stellar wallet. Follow the instructions sent to your email to get started. Explore active campaigns and fund one in seconds.
home.onboardingItem1: Each campaign settles in either USDC or XLM - that is what moves the progress bar.
home.onboardingItem2: You can pay with XLM or USDC; if they differ, Stellar converts automatically when a path exists.
home.onboardingItem3: Watch for live quotes in the contribute window before you confirm.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: A Stellar wallet is created for you automatically.
register.creator: Creator
register.required: Name, email, and password are required.
register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

createCampaign.title: Start a campaign
createCampaign.subtitle: We create a dedicated Stellar wallet for your campaign. You choose the settlement asset and, if you want staged releases, define the milestone plan that unlocks funds over time.
createCampaign.tip1: Pick the asset that matches how you think about your goal (USD-like vs XLM).
createCampaign.tip2: Milestones are optional, but they make releases auditable and give backers more confidence.
createCampaign.tip3: Withdrawals need both you and CrowdPay to sign - milestone campaigns use that flow automatically.
createCampaign.settlementAssetHelp: Progress and payouts use this asset. Contributors may use a different asset if Stellar can convert it.
createCampaign.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell backers what the funds will be used for and what success looks like.
createCampaign.coverImageHelp: Drag and drop a JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image (max 5MB), or browse files.
createCampaign.showAmounts: Show contribution amounts on backer wall
createCampaign.showAmountsHelp: If unchecked, backers will be listed but their individual amounts will be hidden from the public.
createCampaign.milestoneHelp: Milestones are optional. If you add them, define between 1 and 10 release checkpoints and make sure the percentages sum to exactly 100.
createCampaign.noMilestones: No milestones added yet. Legacy campaigns can still use the existing single-withdrawal flow.
createCampaign.creatorOnly: Only creator or admin accounts can start campaigns.

campaign.createdBannerBody: Share the link - contributors can fund in XLM or USDC when conversion paths are available.
campaign.goalReachedBody: This campaign has met its funding target. Contributions may still be open until the creator closes the campaign.
campaign.campaignEndedBody: This campaign did not reach its goal. Contributions are closed and refunds can be requested.
campaign.legacyCampaignBody: this campaign was created before creator identity verification was required.
campaign.title: Campaign
campaign.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
campaign.titleMax: Title must be at most 100 characters
campaign.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 1000 characters
campaign.deadlinePast: Deadline cannot be in the past
campaign.beFirstToBack: Be the first to back this!
campaign.backerWallHelp: Every contribution counts towards making this goal a reality.
campaign.welcomeBody: Your account includes a custodial Stellar wallet. Follow the instructions sent to your email to get started. Explore active campaigns and fund one in seconds.

contribute.title: Support this campaign
contribute.subtitle: Goal currency: {{asset}}. You choose what you send; the campaign receives the amount below in {{asset}}.
contribute.freighterHint: You sign in-browser; CrowdPay never sees your key
contribute.anchorDepositHint: Open a bank or cash ramp, fund your Stellar wallet, then contribute automatically
contribute.freighterMissing: Freighter extension not detected. Install it to contribute from your own Stellar wallet.
contribute.anchorFlowSummary: {{name}}. CrowdPay will open the anchor's hosted KYC and payment flow, wait for {{asset}} to arrive in your Stellar wallet, and then submit the campaign contribution for you.
contribute.amountHelp: This is the credited amount toward the campaign goal, in {{asset}}.
contribute.remaining: You can contribute up to {{amount}} {{asset}} more.
contribute.displayNameHelp: Visible on the campaign's backer wall. Leave blank to contribute anonymously.
contribute.crossAssetBody: Stellar will convert from {{from}} to {{to}} when you confirm. Estimated fees are tiny; conversion uses the network DEX.
contribute.nonCustodialBody: CrowdPay will prepare the transaction, Freighter will ask you to sign it locally, and only the signed XDR comes back for submission.
contribute.anchorDepositBody: This starts a SEP-24 flow with {{name}}. After the deposit confirms, CrowdPay submits the normal Stellar contribution from your custodial wallet.
contribute.completeDepositBody: Finish the hosted deposit flow in the popup window. CrowdPay is polling the anchor and will submit the campaign contribution automatically when the funds arrive.
contribute.confirmingBody: Your payment was submitted. We're waiting for it to be confirmed on the Stellar ledger, which usually takes 3-5 seconds.
contribute.paymentSubmittedBody: Your contribution is on its way. It usually confirms in a few seconds on Stellar.
contribute.enterAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
contribute.belowMinimum: Contribution amount is below the minimum limit of {{amount}} {{asset}}.
contribute.aboveMaximum: Contribution violates the maximum limit of {{amount}} {{asset}} per backer.
contribute.finalizationFailed: The contribution transaction failed on Stellar. Please try again.
contribute.quoteUnavailable: No conversion path is available for this pair right now. Try the campaign's asset or a different amount.
contribute.contributeError: Payment could not be submitted. Try again.
contribute.freighterError: Freighter payment could not be submitted. Try again.
contribute.campaignNotFound: Campaign not found or no longer active.
contribute.amountAssetError: Check your amount and asset selection.
contribute.conversionFailed: Conversion failed. Try another amount or asset.

dispute.title: Report a problem
dispute.description: Raising a dispute will freeze any pending withdrawals on {{title}} while the platform reviews your claim.
dispute.nonDelivery: Non-delivery - creator has not delivered what was promised
dispute.misrepresentation: Misrepresentation - campaign details were false or misleading
dispute.abandoned: Abandoned - creator is unresponsive or has abandoned the project

kyc.title: Verify your identity to create campaigns
kyc.body: CrowdPay requires verified creator identity before launch so backers can trust who receives funds.
kyc.sessionStarted: Verification session started, but no redirect URL was returned.

offline.banner: You're offline — changes may not be saved
